loop1.title: Thermal Timeline
loop1.note: Showing electrical metrics (active power, frequency, current, voltage) as proxies for thermal history — the DG-1 MFM does not log specific temperature columns (coolant, oil, intake, exhaust).

loop1.title: Pressure · Speed · Load
loop1.note: Showing active power as a proxy for load percentage and frequency as a proxy for engine speed, as specific DG oil pressure, speed, and load columns are not present in the meter's schema. Min Oil Pressure and Oil Pressure Event Count are honest-blanked as no pressure data is measured.
